summary: Iteration 232 - Sovereign Architecture Testing Complete. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). All new features working: (1) GET /api/sovereign/status returns user tier, AI brain, experience, capabilities, active units. (2) GET /api/sovereign/tiers returns 4 tiers with 13-row comparison table. (3) GET /api/sovereign/units returns 12 purchasable cross-tier units. (4) POST /api/sovereign/units/purchase works with proper 402/404 error handling. (5) POST /api/sovereign/thinking-feed returns thinking chain with 2-3 agents. (6) GET /api/sovereign/agents returns Alpha/Beta/Gamma agent personas. Frontend: /sovereign page loads with all 4 tabs (Overview, Tiers, Cross-Tier Shop, Glass Box). Dashboard has 'Sovereign' navigation in Explore section with Crown icon.

issues: Trial Graduation modal blocks page interaction on first visit - user must dismiss it first. This is expected behavior but may confuse users.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend sovereign_arch.py correctly implements 4 SOVEREIGN_TIERS with proper progression (Standard→Apprentice→Artisan→Sovereign)
12 CROSS_TIER_UNITS correctly configured with tier availability and pricing
Glass Box Thinking Feed correctly uses Gemini via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for AI responses
Agent coordination (Gamma) only appears for artisan+ or purchased agent_session unit
effective_capabilities correctly merges tier capabilities with purchased units
Frontend SovereignArchitecture.js correctly implements all 4 tabs with proper data-testid attributes
Dashboard.js correctly includes Sovereign in ALL_ACTIONS with Crown icon and gold color (#FBBF24)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 232 verified all Sovereign Architecture features: (1) 4-tier model (Standard/Apprentice/Artisan/Sovereign) with proper codenames (The Seed/The Bloom/The Architect/The Super User). (2) 12 cross-tier purchasable units available to lower tiers. (3) Glass Box Thinking Feed with Alpha (Geometer) and Beta (Harmonizer) agents for Standard tier, Gamma (Logistics) for Artisan+. (4) Test user has 'unit-thinking-feed' already purchased and active. (5) Frontend /sovereign page has 4 tabs: Overview (AI Brain, Experience, Tools, Effective Capabilities, Active Units, Perks), Tiers (4 tier cards + 13-row comparison table), Cross-Tier Shop (12 units with Buy buttons), Glass Box (agent grid + query input). (6) Dashboard has Sovereign in Explore section with Crown icon. (7) All regression tests pass - mixer subscription, templates, recording config, dashboard stats, consciousness status.

backend_sovereign_status.details: GET /api/sovereign/status returns tier, tier_name, codename, persona, ai_brain, experience, effective_capabilities, active_units

backend_sovereign_tiers_4.details: GET /api/sovereign/tiers returns 4 tiers in correct order: standard, apprentice, artisan, sovereign

backend_sovereign_tiers_comparison_13_ro.details: Comparison table has 13 rows covering AI Brain, Visuals, Audio, Tools, AI Credits, Thinking Feed, Asset Export, Marketplace, Mixer Tracks, Video Recording, Audio Recording, Speed Bridge, Automation

backend_sovereign_units_12.details: GET /api/sovereign/units returns 12 purchasable units for Standard tier

backend_sovereign_thinking_feed.details: POST /api/sovereign/thinking-feed returns thinking_chain with 2 agents (Alpha/Beta) for Standard tier with purchased unit

backend_sovereign_agents.details: GET /api/sovereign/agents returns 3 agents: Alpha (Geometer), Beta (Harmonizer), Gamma (Logistics)

frontend_sovereign_page_loads.details: /sovereign page loads with title 'Sovereign Architecture' and current tier badge

frontend_sovereign_4_tabs.details: All 4 tabs present: Overview, Compare Tiers, Cross-Tier Shop, Glass Box

frontend_sovereign_tiers_tab.details: Tiers tab shows 4 tier cards (standard, apprentice, artisan, sovereign) with feature comparison table

frontend_sovereign_units_tab.details: Cross-Tier Shop tab shows 12 unit cards with 11 Buy buttons (1 already active)

frontend_sovereign_glassbox_tab.details: Glass Box tab shows thinking feed input, Orchestrate button, and agent grid

frontend_sovereign_thinking_result.details: Thinking result appears with 2 agents (Alpha/Beta) showing layers with confidence bars

frontend_dashboard_sovereign_nav.details: Dashboard has 'Sovereign' action in Explore section with Crown icon and gold color
